tables.name: station
tables.description: Bike sharing stations with location and capacity information. Contains 70 stations across the San Francisco Bay Area.

columns.name: city
columns.description: City where the bike station is located. Type: TEXT. Values: 'San Jose', 'Mountain View', 'San Francisco', 'Redwood City', 'Palo Alto'.

columns.name: dock_count
columns.description: Number of docking slots available at the station. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '15', '19', '23'.

columns.name: installation_date
columns.description: Date when the station was installed. Type: TEXT (M/D/YYYY format). Examples: '8/5/2013', '8/16/2013', '8/25/2013'.

columns.name: lat
columns.description: Latitude coordinate of the station location. Type: TEXT (decimal degrees). Examples: '37.330165', '37.794139'.

columns.name: long
columns.description: Longitude coordinate of the station location. Type: TEXT (decimal degrees, negative for western hemisphere). Examples: '-121.885831', '-122.394434'.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Name of the bike station, typically a street intersection or landmark. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'San Salvador at 1st', 'Steuart at Market', 'Golden Gate at Polk'.

tables.name: status
tables.description: Real-time status snapshots of bike stations showing bike and dock availability at specific timestamps. Contains 500 records.

columns.name: bikes_available
columns.description: Number of bikes currently available at the station. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '5', '7'.

columns.name: docks_available
columns.description: Number of empty docks currently available at the station. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '4', '10', '14'.

columns.name: station_name
columns.description: Name of the station this status record refers to. References station.name. Type: TEXT.

columns.name: time
columns.description: Timestamp when this status was recorded. Type: TEXT (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format). Examples: '2015-06-02 14:09:02'.

tables.name: trip
tables.description: Individual bike trip records with start/end details, duration, and rider type. Contains 500 records.

columns.name: bike_id
columns.description: Unique identifier of the bike used for the trip. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '434', '206', '312'.

columns.name: duration
columns.description: Duration of the trip in seconds. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '222' (about 4 min), '1785' (about 30 min).

columns.name: end_date
columns.description: Date and time when the trip ended. Type: TEXT (M/D/YYYY H:MM format). Examples: '8/21/2015 17:16'.

columns.name: end_station_name
columns.description: Name of the station where the trip ended. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'San Francisco Caltrain 2 (330 Townsend)', 'Arena Green / SAP Center'.

columns.name: start_date
columns.description: Date and time when the trip started. Type: TEXT (M/D/YYYY H:MM format). Examples: '8/21/2015 17:12'.

columns.name: start_station_name
columns.description: Name of the station where the trip began. Type: TEXT. Examples: '2nd at South Park', 'Market at 10th'.

columns.name: subscription_type
columns.description: Type of rider subscription. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Subscriber' (annual member) or 'Customer' (short-term/casual user).

columns.name: zip_code
columns.description: ZIP code of the rider. Type: TEXT. Examples: '95014', '95113', '94403'.

tables.name: weather
tables.description: Daily weather observations for the Bay Area, including temperature, humidity, wind, and precipitation. Contains 500 records.

columns.name: cloud_cover
columns.description: Cloud cover level on a scale (0-8, where 0 is clear sky and 8 is fully overcast). Type: TEXT (numeric string).

columns.name: date
columns.description: Date of the weather observation. Type: TEXT (M/D/YYYY format). Examples: '9/11/2013', '9/5/2013'.

columns.name: events
columns.description: Notable weather events for the day. Type: TEXT. Values: '' (empty/none), 'Rain', 'Fog', 'Fog-Rain', 'rain'.

columns.name: max_dew_point_f
columns.description: Maximum dew point temperature in Fahrenheit. Type: TEXT (numeric string).

columns.name: max_gust_speed_mph
columns.description: Maximum wind gust speed in miles per hour. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '23', '25', '6'.

columns.name: max_humidity
columns.description: Maximum humidity percentage for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '78', '82', '72'.

columns.name: max_sea_level_pressure_inches
columns.description: Maximum sea level atmospheric pressure in inches of mercury. Type: TEXT (decimal string). Examples: '30', '30.03', '30.26'.

columns.name: max_temperature_f
columns.description: Maximum temperature in Fahrenheit for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '74', '75', '70'.

columns.name: max_visibility_miles
columns.description: Maximum visibility distance in miles. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Typically '10'.

columns.name: max_wind_speed_mph
columns.description: Maximum sustained wind speed in miles per hour. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '18', '21', '5'.

columns.name: mean_dew_point_f
columns.description: Mean dew point temperature in Fahrenheit for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string).

columns.name: mean_humidity
columns.description: Mean humidity percentage for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '68', '70', '52'.

columns.name: mean_sea_level_pressure_inches
columns.description: Mean sea level atmospheric pressure in inches of mercury. Type: TEXT (decimal string).

columns.name: mean_temperature_f
columns.description: Mean temperature in Fahrenheit for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '68', '61', '52'.

columns.name: mean_visibility_miles
columns.description: Mean visibility distance in miles for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Typically '10'.

columns.name: mean_wind_speed_mph
columns.description: Mean wind speed in miles per hour for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '9', '8', '0', '2'.

columns.name: min_dew_point_f
columns.description: Minimum dew point temperature in Fahrenheit. Type: TEXT (numeric string).

columns.name: min_humidity
columns.description: Minimum humidity percentage for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string).

columns.name: min_sea_level_pressure_inches
columns.description: Minimum sea level atmospheric pressure in inches of mercury. Type: TEXT (decimal string).

columns.name: min_temperature_f
columns.description: Minimum temperature in Fahrenheit for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '62', '51', '44', '48'.

columns.name: min_visibility_miles
columns.description: Minimum visibility distance in miles for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '10', '9', '7'.

columns.name: precipitation_inches
columns.description: Total precipitation in inches for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string). '0' for no precipitation. Examples: '0', '0.5'.

columns.name: wind_dir_degrees
columns.description: Wind direction in compass degrees (0-360, where 0/360=North, 90=East, 180=South, 270=West). Type: TEXT (numeric string).

columns.name: zip_code
columns.description: ZIP code of the weather observation location. Type: TEXT. Examples: '94107' (SF), '94063', '94301' (Palo Alto).
